## Type

- [ ] Editor behavior
- [ ] Export/import
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repository hygiene

## Public-Safe Check

- [ ] No private diagrams, credentials, tokens, customer data, or internal URLs are included.
- [ ] Screenshots and fixtures are demo-safe.
- [ ] Generated files are intentional and useful for the public repo.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`
- [ ] Rendered QA, if UI/export/import behavior changed
